nasb.text: Now there is in Jerusalem by the sheep gate a pool, which is called in Hebrew Bethesda, having five porticoes.

esv.text: Now there is in Jerusalem by the Sheep Gate a pool, in Aramaic called Bethesda, which has five roofed colonnades.

cnv.text: 在耶路撒冷靠近羊門有一個水池，希伯來話叫作畢士大，池邊有五條走廊。

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷靠近羊门的地方有一个水池，希伯来话叫毕士大，池边有五条走廊，

csbs.text: 在耶路撒冷的羊门附近有一个池子，希伯来语叫做“贝示达”，那里有五道柱廊。
